testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_03

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/feed/subscriptions')' Actual value: https://www.youtube.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 15000ms 18 × unexpected value "https://www.youtube.com/"

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/shorts/')' Actual value: https://www.youtube.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://www.youtube.com/"

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_03

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/feed/subscriptions')' Actual value: https://www.youtube.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://www.youtube.com/"

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("#endpoint").first - locator resolved to … - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 56 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms

testcase.name: test_TC_Authentication_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('accounts\\.google\\.com/ServiceLogin')' Actual value: https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den-GB%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fresults%253Fsearch_query%253Dlos%252Bangeles&dsh=S1043858425%3A1772168300820448&ec=65620&hl=en-GB&ifkv=ASfE1-rRGx6p7qyQ_uejCLRzPj_1GM-uuYKA_ittueCjRnvJ7W9J2n_J9wdxBHqw4qnVZDoFo8hFCw&passive=true&service=youtube&uilel=3&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&flowEntry=ServiceLogin Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 8 × unexpected value "https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den-GB%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fresults%253Fsearch_query%253Dlos%252Bangeles&dsh=S1043858425%3A1772168300820448&ec=65620&hl=en-GB&ifkv=ASfE1-rRGx6p7qyQ_uejCLRzPj_1GM-uuYKA_ittueCjRnvJ7W9J2n_J9wdxBHqw4qnVZDoFo8hFCw&passive=true&service=youtube&uilel=3&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&flowEntry=ServiceLogin"

testcase.name: test_TC_Authentication_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('accounts\\.google\\.com/ServiceLogin')' Actual value: https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den-GB%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fresults%253Fsearch_query%253Dlos%252Bangeles&dsh=S321002490%3A1772168349733865&ec=65620&hl=en-GB&ifkv=ASfE1-rSv6FJ8wWYSV7w8JXayW0bCXYx94_C0RhnD1ePO4sHQb7ILdDvuW1X6p4IIrh8YtvBCaN8_g&passive=true&service=youtube&uilel=3&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&flowEntry=ServiceLogin Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den-GB%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fresults%253Fsearch_query%253Dlos%252Bangeles&dsh=S321002490%3A1772168349733865&ec=65620&hl=en-GB&ifkv=ASfE1-rSv6FJ8wWYSV7w8JXayW0bCXYx94_C0RhnD1ePO4sHQb7ILdDvuW1X6p4IIrh8YtvBCaN8_g&passive=true&service=youtube&uilel=3&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&flowEntry=ServiceLogin"
